params.body: {"model":"gemma3:4b","prompt":"Write a concise note for Week 4 of an IoT security course on firmware static analysis. Facts: from a firmware image file, strings and grep extracted hardcoded secrets (an admin password, an API key, and an RSA private key) (SECRETS_FOUND); awk on the embedded /etc/passwd found an undocumented UID-0 account named factory, a manufacturer backdoor (BACKDOOR_FOUND); a hardened firmware with no embedded secrets, per-device provisioning, no backdoor, and signing showed zero secrets under the same analysis (FIRMWARE_HARDENED). Explain that hardcoded secrets are shared across every unit of a model so one dump compromises them all, and that defense keeps secrets out of firmware via per-device provisioning and signing, removing backdoors. Begin with exactly the single word Assessment on its own first line.","stream":false,"options":{"num_predict":330}}

token:
도구 실행 결과 보고  
- **http_request** `GET http://211.170.162.139:10934/api/generate` → `success=False`,

연결 오류(네트워크 타임아웃).  
- **shell** `curl …` (target *attacker*) → `precheck-fail`: 10.20.30.1 unreachab

le, 즉 bastion→attacker 네트워크 경로가 차단됨.  

가능 원인: (1) 방화벽/라우터에서 외부 IP(211.170.162.139)와의 HTTP 통신이 차단되었거

나 DNS/라우팅 오류; (2) 내부 `attacker` 컨테이너에 접근 권한·네트워크 인터페이스가 비활성화돼 `10.20.30.1`(bastion)에서 도달 불가.  

다음 시

도 권장:  
- 운영자에게 방화벽 규칙을 확인하고 외부 API 서버(`211.170.162.139`)에 대한 outbound HTTP 허용 여부를 검증한다.  
- `docker
exec el34-attacker ping 10.20.30.1` 등으로 내부 네트워크 연결성을 직접 테스트한 뒤, 필요 시 `docker network connect` 혹은 라우
터 설정을 수정한다.

Facts: from a firmware image file, strings and grep extracted hardcoded secrets (an admin password, an API key, and an RSA private key) (SECRETS_FOUND); awk on the embedded /etc/passwd found an undocumented UID-0 account named factory, a manufacturer backdoor (BACKDOOR_FOUND); a hardened firmware with no embedded secrets, per-device provisioning, no backdoor, and signing showed zero secrets under the same analysis (FIRMWARE_HARDENED). Explain that hardcoded secrets are shared across every unit of a model so one dump compromises them all, and that defense keeps secrets out of firmware via per-device provisioning and signing, removing backdoors. params.prompt: Write a concise note for Week 4 of an IoT security course on firmware static analysis. Facts: from a firmware image file, strings and grep extracted hardcoded secrets (an admin password, an API key, and an RSA private key) (SECRETS_FOUND); awk on the embedded /etc/passwd found an undocumented UID-0 account named factory, a manufacturer backdoor (BACKDOOR_FOUND); a hardened firmware with no embedded secrets, per-device provisioning, no backdoor, and signing showed zero secrets under the same analysis (FIRMWARE_HARDENED). Explain that hardcoded secrets are shared across every unit of a model so one dump compromises them all, and that defense keeps secrets out of firmware via per-device provisioning and signing, removing backdoors. Begin with exactly the single word Assessment on its own first line.

Write a concise note for Week 4 of an IoT security course on firmware static analysis. Facts: from a firmware image file, strings and grep extracted hardcoded secrets (an admin password, an API key, and an RSA private key) (SECRETS_FOUND); awk on the embedded /etc/passwd found an undocumented UID-0 account named factory, a manufacturer backdoor (BACKDOOR_FOUND); a hardened firmware with no embedded secrets, per-device provisioning, no backdoor, and signing showed zero secrets under the same analysis (FIRMWARE_HARDENED). Explain that hardcoded secrets are shared across every unit of a model so one dump compromises them all, and that defense keeps secrets out of firmware via per-device provisioning and signing, removing backdoors. Begin with exactly the single word Assessment on its own first line.

token:
**도구 실행 실패 보고**

1. **실패한 도구와 명령**
   - `shell` (target = attacker) – `curl -s http://211.170.162.13

9:10934/api/generate …` → 사전 체크 단계에서 “10.20.30.1 unreachable” 오류 발생.
   - `http_request` (target = a

ttacker) – 동일 URL에 POST 요청 시 네트워크 연결 실패, `exit=-1`.
   - `shell` (target = bastion) – 같은 `curl` 명령 재

시도했지만 여전히 “10.20.30.1 unreachable”.
   - `ollama_query` – 모델 호출은 성공했으나 **stdout이 비어 있음**(응답 내용 전혀 반환

되지 않음).

2. **가능한 원인**
   - **네트워크 라우팅/방화벽 차단**: 외부 IP 211.170.162.139 로 향하는 트래픽이 `el34-fw` 혹은 내부 라우

터에서 차단되고 있어, bastion(10.20.30.201)과 attacker VM 모두 목적지에 도달하지 못함.
   - **잘못된 target 지정**: `target` 파라
미터가 실제 reachable 호스트가 아닌 `attacker`(10.20.30.202) 혹은 `bastion`(127.0.0.1)으로 설정돼, 내부 DNS/라우팅이 외부 주소를

해석하지 못함.

3. **다음 시도 권장**
   - **네트워크 연결 확인**: `docker exec el34-fw ping -c 3 211.170.162.139` 혹은 `t

raceroute` 로 경로를 점검하고, 필요시 방화벽 규칙을 일시적으로 허용(`fw_rule_add` 사용)해 외부 HTTP(S) 트래픽을 열어본다.
   - **프록시/터널 활
용**: bastion에서 직접 외부에 접근이 불가하면 `ssh -L 8080:211.170.162.139:80 el34-attacker` 로 로컬 포트 포워딩 후, `curl h

ttp://localhost:8080/api/generate …` 로 요청을 시도한다.
   - **대체 모델 호출**: Ollama 서버가 내부에 배포돼 있다면 `target='

manager'` (IP 10.20.30.200) 로 전환해 로컬 LLM 엔드포인트에 직접 질의한다.

> 위 내용은 실제 도구 실행 로그(실패 메시지와 빈 stdout)를 기반으
로 작성되었습니다. 가짜 결과는 포함되지 않았습니다.
